signalExample.name: Ribbita by Virtuals
signalExample.body: Appeared in 7/7 daily runs across messybased and messyinfra and base01 and base04 over the 7-day lookback. Appeared in 7/7 source run(s) with avg rank 1.86, best rank 1, recency score 35.04.

weeklyHighlights: base01 held 5 council sessions this week — 5 signed and reconciled on Base.
base02 held 7 council sessions this week — 7 signed and reconciled on Base.
base04 held 5 council sessions this week — 5 signed and reconciled on Base.
base05 held 4 council sessions this week — 4 signed and reconciled on Base.
TIBBIR showed up consistently across fund screens this week — a leading aggregate candidate, not an automatic trade.

readerNotes.text: Fund pages in the app now include full council minutes — open any fund and tap Council to read what the portfolio committee debated, what the Chair decided, and whether trades were executed.

link.label: How the AI investment council works

readerNotes.text: We publish four Guru micro test funds (base01, base02, base04, base05) alongside the read-only Guru Lotus snapshots. base04 and base05 joined on 10 July with distinct token universes. Every change on those test funds goes through screening, council review, and signed execution — the same path future AI-managed funds will use.
